note: FALLBACK for the 8B point when models_text_8b.json OOMs in the TRAINING backward (traceback in trainer.py / compute_loss / loss.backward). Drops max_seq_len 4096->2048 to halve the training-activation memory. CAVEAT: this breaks strict comparability with the 1.7B/4B runs (which use msl=4096) — report the 8B online number with an asterisk, or (better, if it fits) re-run 1.7B/4B at msl=2048 too for an apples-to-apples 8B comparison. Does NOT help if the OOM is in the compress FORWARD (that is the chunk_size*vocab logits, ~5GB at chunk 8192, independent of msl) — for that, chunk_size must drop or the prefill must be chunked in code. Everything else = frozen config, batch_chunks=1.
